scripts.containerised: npm run build && npm run compose
scripts.installs: npm install && npm run install-admin && npm run install-seller && npm run install-shopper && npm run install-items && npm run install-login && npm run install-cart
scripts.cis: npm ci && npm run ci-admin && npm run ci-seller && npm run ci-shopper && npm run ci-items && npm run ci-login && npm run ci-cart
scripts.build: npm run build-admin && npm run build-seller && npm run build-shopper && npm run build-items && npm run build-login && npm run build-cart
scripts.build-seller: cd App/seller && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start-admin" "npm run start-seller" "npm run start-shopper" "npm run start-items" "npm run start-login" "npm run start-cart"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start-admin" "npm run dev-seller" "npm run dev-shopper" "npm run dev-items" "npm run dev-cart" "npm run start-login"
scripts.dev-seller: cd App/seller && cross-env ITEMS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4500/graphql LOGIN_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4010/api/v0 npm run dev:seller
scripts.dev-shopper: cd App/shopper && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_SELLER_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm run dev
scripts.dev-items: cd Service/ItemsService && cross-env LOGIN_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:4010/api/v0 npm run dev
scripts.dev-cart: cd Service/Cart && cross-env POSTGRES_HOST=localhost POSTGRES_PORT=5433 POSTGRES_USER=postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres CART_POSTGRES_DB=cart npm run dev
scripts.lint: npm run lint-admin && npm run lint-seller && npm run lint-shopper
scripts.cpd: npm run cpd-admin && npm run cpd-seller && npm run cpd-shopper && npm run cpd-items && npm run cpd-login && npm run cpd-cart
scripts.test: npm run test-admin && npm run test-seller && npm run test-shopper
